items.name: SMS-Spam-Detection
items.description: Compares 6 ML classifiers (Naive Bayes, Logistic Regression, KNN, Decision Tree, SVM, Random Forest) to detect spam messages. Uses TF-IDF vectorization and SMOTE for class balancing. Best model (SVM, ~98.2% accuracy) is saved for inference via CLI.
